rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header with no amounts.

rows.description: Poor Rates for North Building 4 at 6/8 each
rows.notes: Chose gemini-flash for accurate description '6/8 each' (gpt-5-mini had '6d each'). Amounts are consistent between both and visually verified. Both correctly identified the braced group and assigned the amount to this first line.

rows.notes: Chose gemini-flash for more accurate description of 'Rector's' (with apostrophe) and '1/-' (with dash). Both agree this is part of a braced group with no separate amount.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the Rector's House assessments, amounting to £0 4s 0d.

rows.description: Proprs, Booms Hall &c for 1784 Geo Padie
rows.notes: Visually verified the description. Chose gemini-flash's reading 'Proprs, Booms Hall &c for 1784 Geo Padie' as accurate. gpt-5-mini's 'Novr. Broom Hall' and 'Pridie' were incorrect upon close inspection. Amounts are consistent and correct between both.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to George Padie for hall provisions for 1784, amounting to £4 8s 4d.

Chose gemini-flash for correct row_type 'total' (as it's a final balance) and accurate description 'Rest. Deb. a Computante' (including the periods and 'Computante' over 'Computando'). Amounts and fraction (visually confirmed as ¾) are consistent between both.
Chose gemini-flash as it correctly combines the date (in the margin) and the main approval phrase into a single logical header. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two separate header rows.
